column4: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not actually insurance. (you cannot access your locker without it)
column5: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not covered by the FSC, and they change policies without telling you. We took out insurance with UK storage when we moved in - you have to show proof of your own insurance or use their policy or they won't let you access your locker. After trying to claim due to vermin infestation and damage (now 8 months into the claim) we have been told the insurance policy we took out was changed to a limited liability policy with a company called storeprotect. We were not notified of this (they say they emailed us but we never received anything). The store protect policy isn't covered by the FSA and isn't really worth having as they then employ a company called questgates to make it is a difficult as possible to claim for anything. It is not an insurance policy despite me having an email from when we moved in saying I was paying for insurance.

column4: An easy way to self store
column5: The whole process, from choosing Uk Storage, to moving in was totally seamless. Using the app gives you the location of your unit, all the relevant dos and don’ts. The barrel lock was waiting in the unit for me. A very easy process. Thank you.
Quick to arrange, good sign up discount. Problems and delays with identity verification, and expensive insurance offered marred the experience.

UK storage are a very approachable company who offer professional advice, making the finding of suitable storage stress free. Tommy Gale is a gem. No sales gimmick talk. Just honest and up front with no hidden costs when giving quotes. You get 50% off for the first 13 weeks at the moment. Very pleased to have booked my storage with this company.

Generally good - once you understand there are no staff to show you around (you have to phone). Once we were able to physically visit and see the units, signing-up was simple. The units are fine. Clean, dry and well-lit and the little lock provided (for a fee) works well, so security isn't a concern. Only mild grumble is not nearly enough trollies. Turned-up for our first proper visit Sunday morning to find three or four other people there with a trolly each and that's all there were. Had to wait to get one. Four trollies is a bit rubbish. Unless there are more stored elsewhere. If there are, it isn't obvious.
The unit is a bit hard to find since the map in the app was not working, but I called the support team, and they were great at helping me. Moving in was easy, the place was clean and ready to go.

I was having a few issues with setting my account up online and it became quite stressful, but i spoke to Sammy on the phone, she was great, super friendly, and managed to get everything sorted for us and eased that stress 100%. Thank you so much Sammy! Give this girl a raise please!!

I would like to give the highest commendation to SAMMY BUSH who has been nothing short of amazing. She consistently provides excellent customer service and is always helpful, professional, and accommodating whenever I get in touch. Sammy is truly an asset to your company, and I feel it’s important that her efforts are recognised. Unfortunately, I cannot say the same about another customer service advisor I have dealt with in the past. That experience was extremely disappointing, as the advisor was rude and passive-aggressive, which made the interaction quite unpleasant. I felt it was important to share both experiences, as they were at complete opposite ends of the spectrum. I hope this feedback is helpful.

column4: Clean, reasonably priced - exactly what you want
column5: Sammy in particular in the customer service team was fantastic. Needed a bigger unit, totally flexible and very responsive. 10/10

Tommy Gale was brilliant, made the whole process simple. Good dry storage and very easy to manage and access to the unit is just what we need. Very easy to setup and takes the pressure off us as we are doing renovations. Thanks again Tommy for making our lives a little bit simpler.

Terrible company and I would not recommend. Two good things to start: the unit was dry. The staff were friendly. Everything else was awful. Every single step of the process was riddled with errors and mistakes, from the very first quote to handing back the unit when finished. Every person I spoke to gave me conflicting information, they were unable to get my details correct causing payment issues from the outset. If you’re planning on using this company while doing something else stressful in your life (like moving house) then avoid.

I called the number on the door and was abruptly told to read the email which I didn't receive. (I received the email later that day, too late). When I got in there are plenty of trolleys and a working lift which was good.

The staff were all so very helpful, polite, kind and patient. The 2 ladies who mostly helped me were Mollie and Melvina. I cannot praise their customer service enough, especially in a day and age when many companies are so unhelpful. Mollie and Melvina were extremely professional, but friendly at the same time. Their assistance was so good it just stood out above any other company. Not to take away from their stunning service, but I did communicate with some other members on the team and all were the same - leading me to conclude that the level of recruitment and customer training at UK Storage must be exceptional. This is not the level of customer service that is normally experience in today's times. It made my experience wonderful and I cannot commend the team enough and just fell so compelled to write a review. An absolute 5 Star/Gold Service experience and I could not recommend enough.

column4: The storage unit that we rented in…Kidderminster

column4: Very disappointed with lack of action to fix broken lift
column5: So we have a storage locker in their building in Milner Street Warrington. We have furniture stored in there for a house move that was taking place, including a large settee which we can't take down the stairs, on Saturday 6th December 2025. On arriving at the facility, the lift which takes us to the second floor where our locker is was not working. There are no other lifts which take us to where our locker is located. We contacted the company and were told they would reset it and we would need to wait 20 minutes. We did that and it still didn't work. Phoned them again and they said they would send an engineer out. We didn't hear anything else so I went to the locker on Sunday morning and it still wasn't working. My wife phoned them and they said they hadn't managed to get an engineer out. We said we had family members who were due to move into their new house the day before, and if it wasn't fixed today they would not be able to move and would have to move in with relatives. They were unable to help or give us any time frame as to when it would be fixed. We rang yesterday, they said an engineer was there, and that was the last we heard. I went down at lunch time, an engineer was there but he was adamant he wasn't there for the lift. I went in and the lift was still broken. My wife has rung again and there is still no resolution to this. My stepdaughter, her partner, their 2 year old little girl and their dog have now been with relatives for 4 days and still no indiocation when the lift will be fixed. The attitude of customer services seems to be they are not particularly bothered.

The storage experience itself was good; easy to arrange, clean premises, plenty of trolleys etc for moving items from your car to your unit. You will get to learn your access code from memory as you have to enter it several times moving through the premises, but at least you know your property is secure. The low score relates to the company's procedure to claiming payment when you vacate and the refund time, which is a shame. You have to pay for each month in advance, which is perfectly fine. You also have to give 2 weeks notice before moving out, which again is fine, but they insist on taking a full month's payment even if you were going over by 1 day having already given that notice period, at the threat of no access if you don't. It then takes them over 3 weeks to refund the difference of what you haven't used. It's a shame as until that the experience had been great.

column4: Worst experience I have ever had of…

I was assured that would not happen again and that it had been sorted. Then yesterday I got an email to say that in 48 hours they are auctioning all of my belongings from the storage unit.. again their error. Each time I phoned I was told somebody would get back to me and it was always me ringing to say that nobody had and what was happening. To make matters worse, when they first started making mistakes, I told them I couldn’t deal with the stress because of having lost my husband to cancer. This company just do not care. There is nobody at the storage unit, no staff there, so each time you have to phone a telephone number. It would be zero, if I could... Reasons being, but not limited to: 1. Nothing but threatening behaviour - I lost my job and was sent a final notice of aution before a first was ever issued 2. Misinformation at every turn - was never told anything, even though they had my email address 3. Changing the lock and not sending a new key - updated my address and still nothing 4. "Oops, sorry" culture of customer service - zero empathy from all staff 5. Final notice sent without a first notice (highly illegal) - just an "oops, sorry". 6. RATS!!! - some of my stuff has been ruined and had to be binned. We even found a rat corpse in one of my boxes! Not to mention...there is no on-site help whatsoever, so if you need assistance in an emergency, you'll have to wait 3-5 working days, except weekends and bank holidays! NEVER EVER USE!!!

After researching several storage providers i settled on UK Storage with Liam Reed as my contact. Liam made the entire process quick and easy and offered me a price that beat all the competitors. Liam was engaging, professional and friendly. A great representative of UK Storage

I needed a storage unit to store household items. Uk Storage made the online booking process easy. The forecourt gates were always open which made accessing the site easy and I appreciated the 24 hour access. The site always appeared to be well maintained and clean. I never had any problems using the facility: there were always trolleys available and the lifts always worked. The CCTV was reassuring. The unit itself was clean and watertight. Nothing went mouldy or smelled musty in my unit. Overall I have been a very happy customer of UK storage and have only moved out due to a change in circumstances. On the few occasions when I have called customer services they have always been friendly and helpful, a pleasure to deal with.

column4: I wandered round last weekend to see…

In an era of A.I., chat bots, outsourced call centres and general customer mistreatment, I have had such a brilliant and heartening experience with UKSC. I needed storage urgently and out of hours and Teegan was so helpful and knowledgeable which you just don’t expect these days from customer care staff. It turned out that unit was too small (my fault, was being tight!) but when I called back and got hold of Melvina, she got me in a bigger unit and made sure I wasn’t paying out of pocket despite my error. Both Teegan and Melvina are two lovely people and they’ve genuinely given me a bit of a boost in my assessment of our society these days.

column4: Not completely open about the cost
column5: Not completely open about the cost, when I viewed the site 50% off? No, you charged VAT on the full price then gave 50% off without VAT Have to pay a cleaning fee whether the unit is clean or not. Why do I have to insurance my stuff if I don't want to?

DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY. I needed a storage unit on short notice and thought this company sounded great. Available at short notice, cheap rates, cancel at any time with 14 days notice. It was a great company until I cancelled. I put in my 2 weeks notice, called on the day we moved out and was told the account would be closed. GREAT. Three days later, and I've just been charged for another month of rent. I'm now in overdraft and can't afford to get to work. Spent an hour on the phone, with multiple staff, who all said it would take up to a week before they can issue a refund. Several staff hung up on me because there's "nothing we can do". I called back to speak to a manager, and was told I couldn't, then got put on hold for 15 mins. Took 7 calls to get put through to a manager who also said there's nothing they can do. If you're late paying rent, you get late fees. But they take as long as they want to refund YOUR money. I WILL NEVER USE THIS COMPANY AGAIN ABSOLUTE THEFT.
Simple, easy and stress free

column4: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not actually insurance. (you cannot access your locker without it)
column5: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not covered by the FSC, and they change policies without telling you. We took out insurance with UK storage when we moved in - you have to show proof of your own insurance or use their policy or they won't let you access your locker. After trying to claim due to vermin infestation and damage (now 8 months into the claim) we have been told the insurance policy we took out was changed to a limited liability policy with a company called storeprotect. We were not notified of this (they say they emailed us but we never received anything). The store protect policy isn't covered by the FSA and isn't really worth having as they then employ a company called questgates to make it is a difficult as possible to claim for anything. It is not an insurance policy despite me having an email from when we moved in saying I was paying for insurance.

column4: The process has been very easy
column5: The process has been very easy, and Sammy was incredibly helpful!
Tbh, they are amazing to communicate with. Very easy going on the phone, very resolutive...amazing company. I will repeat for sure. No doubts. 5 stars in Bristol

In an era of A.I., chat bots, outsourced call centres and general customer mistreatment, I have had such a brilliant and heartening experience with UKSC. I needed storage urgently and out of hours and Teegan was so helpful and knowledgeable which you just don’t expect these days from customer care staff. It turned out that unit was too small (my fault, was being tight!) but when I called back and got hold of Melvina, she got me in a bigger unit and made sure I wasn’t paying out of pocket despite my error. Both Teegan and Melvina are two lovely people and they’ve genuinely given me a bit of a boost in my assessment of our society these days.

column4: Not completely open about the cost
column5: Not completely open about the cost, when I viewed the site 50% off? No, you charged VAT on the full price then gave 50% off without VAT Have to pay a cleaning fee whether the unit is clean or not. Why do I have to insurance my stuff if I don't want to?

DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY. I needed a storage unit on short notice and thought this company sounded great. Available at short notice, cheap rates, cancel at any time with 14 days notice. It was a great company until I cancelled. I put in my 2 weeks notice, called on the day we moved out and was told the account would be closed. GREAT. Three days later, and I've just been charged for another month of rent. I'm now in overdraft and can't afford to get to work. Spent an hour on the phone, with multiple staff, who all said it would take up to a week before they can issue a refund. Several staff hung up on me because there's "nothing we can do". I called back to speak to a manager, and was told I couldn't, then got put on hold for 15 mins. Took 7 calls to get put through to a manager who also said there's nothing they can do. If you're late paying rent, you get late fees. But they take as long as they want to refund YOUR money. I WILL NEVER USE THIS COMPANY AGAIN ABSOLUTE THEFT.
Simple, easy and stress free

column4: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not actually insurance. (you cannot access your locker without it)
column5: Beware their 'insurance' policies as they are not covered by the FSC, and they change policies without telling you. We took out insurance with UK storage when we moved in - you have to show proof of your own insurance or use their policy or they won't let you access your locker. After trying to claim due to vermin infestation and damage (now 8 months into the claim) we have been told the insurance policy we took out was changed to a limited liability policy with a company called storeprotect. We were not notified of this (they say they emailed us but we never received anything). The store protect policy isn't covered by the FSA and isn't really worth having as they then employ a company called questgates to make it is a difficult as possible to claim for anything. It is not an insurance policy despite me having an email from when we moved in saying I was paying for insurance.

Absolutely superb service . I was blessed to be able to have such a professional member of staff in Melvina From the outset, everything was made clear to me in the most kind and competent manner . Everything was just as we had hoped .....all companies need Melvina !!! God bless you all x

column4: Very easy to use via the app

Very easy sing-up process, helpful staff, nice and clean, great service!

column4: My overall experience with UK Storage…
column5: My overall experience with UK Storage has been excellent. The facilities, price, location and the customer service has always been outstanding. Everytime I called my queries were answered quickly and with kindness. I would definitely use these services again.

Mr. Gale quickly addressed my storage needs and provided a storage unit that would be suitable. He advised me to place a small £10.00 deposit to secure my unit, while I needed extra time to compare other units. I appreciate his professionalism!

column4: An easy way to self store
column5: The whole process, from choosing Uk Storage, to moving in was totally seamless. Using the app gives you the location of your unit, all the relevant dos and don’ts. The barrel lock was waiting in the unit for me. A very easy process. Thank you.
Quick to arrange, good sign up discount. Problems and delays with identity verification, and expensive insurance offered marred the experience.

UK storage are a very approachable company who offer professional advice, making the finding of suitable storage stress free. Tommy Gale is a gem. No sales gimmick talk. Just honest and up front with no hidden costs when giving quotes. You get 50% off for the first 13 weeks at the moment. Very pleased to have booked my storage with this company.

Generally good - once you understand there are no staff to show you around (you have to phone). Once we were able to physically visit and see the units, signing-up was simple. The units are fine. Clean, dry and well-lit and the little lock provided (for a fee) works well, so security isn't a concern. Only mild grumble is not nearly enough trollies. Turned-up for our first proper visit Sunday morning to find three or four other people there with a trolly each and that's all there were. Had to wait to get one. Four trollies is a bit rubbish. Unless there are more stored elsewhere. If there are, it isn't obvious.
The unit is a bit hard to find since the map in the app was not working, but I called the support team, and they were great at helping me. Moving in was easy, the place was clean and ready to go.

I was having a few issues with setting my account up online and it became quite stressful, but i spoke to Sammy on the phone, she was great, super friendly, and managed to get everything sorted for us and eased that stress 100%. Thank you so much Sammy! Give this girl a raise please!!

I would like to give the highest commendation to SAMMY BUSH who has been nothing short of amazing. She consistently provides excellent customer service and is always helpful, professional, and accommodating whenever I get in touch. Sammy is truly an asset to your company, and I feel it’s important that her efforts are recognised. Unfortunately, I cannot say the same about another customer service advisor I have dealt with in the past. That experience was extremely disappointing, as the advisor was rude and passive-aggressive, which made the interaction quite unpleasant. I felt it was important to share both experiences, as they were at complete opposite ends of the spectrum. I hope this feedback is helpful.

column4: Clean, reasonably priced - exactly what you want

Terrible company and I would not recommend. Two good things to start: the unit was dry. The staff were friendly. Everything else was awful. Every single step of the process was riddled with errors and mistakes, from the very first quote to handing back the unit when finished. Every person I spoke to gave me conflicting information, they were unable to get my details correct causing payment issues from the outset. If you’re planning on using this company while doing something else stressful in your life (like moving house) then avoid.
